title: Strongsville Flagship Branch
content: FinChat Bank Flagship Branch is at 100 Prairie Tower, Strongsville, OH 44136. Lobby hours: Monday-Friday 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM, closed Sunday. Drive-thru opens at 8:00 AM weekdays. Phone (440) 555-0100.

title: Lakewood Branch
content: The Lakewood Branch is at 22 Beacon Harbor Way, Lakewood, OH 44107. Lobby hours: Monday-Thursday 9:00 AM to 4:30 PM, Friday 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM, closed Sunday. Notary service available by appointment.

title: Dublin Tech Center Branch
content: The Dublin Tech Center Branch is at 4501 Innovation Loop, Dublin, OH 43017. This is a cashless advisory branch open Monday-Friday 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM for account opening, lending, and wealth consultations. No teller cash services; use the 24-hour ATM vestibule.

title: ATM Network and Access
content: FinChat Bank operates 24-hour ATMs at every branch plus 1,200 surcharge-free ATMs in the Allpoint network. FinChat does not charge its own customers for balance inquiries or withdrawals at in-network ATMs. Out-of-network ATM operators may charge their own fee.

title: Holiday Closures
content: All FinChat Bank branches are closed on federal holidays: New Year's Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Presidents' Day, Memorial Day, Juneteenth, Independence Day, Labor Day, Columbus Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas Day. Online and mobile banking remain available 24/7.

title: Everyday Checking Terms & Conditions
content: Everyday Checking has no minimum opening deposit and no monthly maintenance fee when you maintain a $500 average daily balance OR receive $250 in monthly direct deposits. Otherwise a $7 monthly service fee applies. The account includes a debit card, online bill pay, and mobile check deposit.

title: Premier Savings Terms & Conditions
content: Premier Savings requires a $100 minimum opening deposit. Interest is compounded daily and credited monthly. Federal regulation and our policy limit certain withdrawals to six per statement cycle; excess withdrawals may incur a $10 fee. A $5 monthly fee is waived with a $300 minimum daily balance.

title: Funds Availability Policy
content: Under FinChat Bank's funds availability policy, direct deposits and the first $225 of a check deposit are available the same business day. Remaining check funds are generally available the next business day. New accounts (open less than 30 days) and large deposits over $5,525 may be held longer; you will receive a hold notice.

title: Overdraft Policy
content: FinChat Bank charges a $35 overdraft fee per item when we pay a transaction that overdraws your account, limited to three overdraft fees per day. We do not charge overdraft fees on transactions of $5 or less. Standard overdraft coverage for debit-card and ATM transactions is opt-in. Enroll in free Overdraft Protection to link a savings account for automatic transfers.

title: Disputing a Transaction
content: To dispute an unauthorized or incorrect transaction, contact FinChat Bank within 60 days of the statement date. Report by phone at (440) 555-0100, in the mobile app under Transactions > Dispute, or in branch. We issue provisional credit within 10 business days while we investigate, and resolve most disputes within 45 days.

title: Privacy & Data Protection
content: FinChat Bank collects only the personal information needed to provide services and never sells customer data. Sensitive identifiers are encrypted and tokenized; access is restricted and audited. You may opt out of marketing and request a copy of your data by contacting Privacy Services. We comply with GLBA and applicable state privacy laws.

title: Fee Schedule: Overdraft & Returned Items
content: Overdraft item fee: $35 (max 3/day). Returned item (NSF): $35. Overdraft Protection transfer from linked savings: $0. Continuous overdraft fee after 7 days negative: $25.

title: Fee Schedule: Wires & Transfers
content: Domestic incoming wire: $15. Domestic outgoing wire: $25. International incoming wire: $18. International outgoing wire: $45. ACH transfers between your FinChat accounts: free. Same-day ACH: $5.

title: Fee Schedule: Account Services
content: Monthly maintenance (Everyday Checking): $7, waivable. Paper statement: $2/month (free with e-statements). Stop payment: $30. Cashier's check: $10. Account research: $25/hour. Replacement debit card: $5 standard, $25 expedited.

title: Personal Loan Basics
content: FinChat Bank personal loans range from $2,000 to $50,000 with terms of 12 to 60 months and fixed rates based on creditworthiness. There is no prepayment penalty. Decisions use your credit profile, debt-to-income ratio, and account overdraft history. Most applicants receive a decision within one business day; some are routed to a loan officer for review.

title: Lending Rates & Eligibility
content: Personal loan APRs currently range from 8.99% to 23.99% depending on credit. To qualify you must be at least 18, have a verifiable income, and a FinChat checking or savings account. A debt-to-income ratio under 43% and limited overdraft history improve approval odds and pricing. Loans over $25,000 may require additional documentation.

title: How Loan Approval Works
content: After you submit a loan request, FinChat generates a credit profile, reviews your transaction and overdraft history, and computes a risk score. Low-risk applications may be auto-approved; borderline ones are routed to a human loan officer who can approve, decline, request modification, or make a counteroffer. You are notified of the decision by email and in the app.

title: Account Security Tips
content: FinChat Bank will never ask for your full password, PIN, or one-time code by phone, text, or email. Enable two-factor authentication, set transaction alerts, and review activity regularly. If you suspect fraud, freeze your card instantly in the app under Cards > Freeze, then call (440) 555-0100.

title: Online & Mobile Banking
content: The FinChat mobile app supports mobile check deposit, bill pay, person-to-person transfers, card freeze, balance and transaction history, and chat with the FinChat Assistant. Mobile deposit funds follow the standard funds availability policy. The app is available 24/7 even when branches are closed.

title: Contact & Support
content: Reach FinChat Bank customer support at (440) 555-0100, Monday-Friday 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM and Saturday 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM ET. Secure message and live chat are available 24/7 in the app and at finchat.datadinosaur.com. For lost or stolen cards, support is available 24/7.

title: Statements & Tax Documents
content: Monthly statements are available in online banking by the 5th business day of each month and retained for 7 years. Tax documents (1099-INT for interest of $10 or more) are posted by January 31. Paper statements are $2/month; e-statements are free and can be downloaded as PDF.

title: Transfer & Send Limits
content: Person-to-person send limits are $1,000 per day and $5,000 per 30 days for established accounts. Mobile check deposit limits are $5,000 per day and $15,000 per 30 days. External transfer (ACH) limits are $10,000 per day. Limits may be lower for accounts open less than 60 days.
